what_was_done: Fixed vector_256 column type mismatch (string→list) on all 5 LanceDB tables — memory writes were silently failing. Moved working-memory/summary from rules/ to hooks/ saving ~636 tok/call. Added content-hash skip to WorkingMemoryWriter. Cleaned up ~5GB of stale repos (terminalius, BEAM, opencode, herm).
known_issues: rate_limits statusline field null on API key billing
Gate 23: Go test naming too rigid — needs smarter _has_test_on_disk for Go packages
§8.2 Autonomous Mode Safety deferred (write-then-execute risk, verification_specialist unguarded subprocess)
Gate 14/20 redundancy: both check session_test_baseline, Gate 20 check is dead code
kg_to_obsidian.py generates underscore filenames for entities — causes graph duplication when project uses hyphens
MCP auth error when launching Claude Code from ~/.claude/hooks/ subdirectory
next_steps: Fix kg_to_obsidian.py to normalize entity names to hyphen-case
Run kg_to_obsidian.py periodically (cron or post-session hook)
Remove redundant Gate 20 checks (shadowed by Gate 14)
Memory maintenance: DB at 4051 entries, run stale cleanup
Delete framework-v5 .venv (5.1GB of duplicate CUDA/torch libs)
last_response_preview: No local overrides. The MCP config in `~/.claude.json` should apply everywhere. Try launching from `~/.claude/` instead of `~/.claude/hooks/` — the hooks dir isn't meant to be a working directory for Claude Code. Or try option 1 (Authenticate) then dismiss it — sometimes that resets the connection state.
